herbs.herb_desc: Achillea millefolium, also known as yarrow essential oil, is derived from the flowers and leaves of the yarrow plant and is often used in aromatherapy for its calming and anti-inflammatory properties. This oil is commonly used to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor burns, as well as to alleviate digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Additionally, yarrow essential oil is said to have antiseptic and antispasmodic properties, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns.
